rules: Don't add single-session tasks (those go in today.md)
Don't add high-level goals (those go in goals.md)
Remind user about tasks stale >14 days

tasks.title: Charades code cleanup pass
tasks.context: Pre-MVP review identified three cleanup areas: stale useGameState dependencies around send/socket reconnects, dead presenter/runtime leftovers after recent refactors, and oversized files in results/playboard that break repo limits.
tasks.next_action: Fix useGameState dependency issues first, then remove dead presenter/runtime code, then split oversized Charades files.

tasks.title: Charades weighted reroll smoke test and hardening
tasks.context: Weighted reroll, browser word-history persistence, pool management, low-pool start warning, and the latest setup modal UI pass are implemented. `Podpowiedzi` are now also wired into the host gameplay flow, and the recent Charades UI refactor extracted shared runtime/settings primitives into `@party/ui`.
tasks.next_action: Run a real browser smoke test across the host/setup/results flow after the shared UI extraction, focusing on settings modal interactions, hints visibility, reroll flow, and results/podium rendering.
